angles: payment rails are improving but card access still blocks teams
wallet and checkout improvements raise user expectations for payment speed
cross-border operators need funding and spend to feel as fast as the products they buy
global payment infrastructure is getting better, but workflow friction still sits at the card layer
better ad tooling still needs cleaner billing and payment control
creative and campaign automation increase the need for reliable payment setup
media buyers need card workflows that keep pace with campaign changes
ad teams can move faster when payment friction does not interrupt testing and scaling
hooks: Ad platforms keep adding smarter tools.
Creative workflows are getting more dynamic.
Paid media teams have more leverage than ever.

angles: AI adoption creates more recurring subscriptions that need a reliable payment layer
as teams add more AI tools, payment sprawl becomes a real operations problem
subscription growth around AI products raises the value of flexible virtual cards
AI tool adoption is fast, but the payment setup behind those tools still needs work
hooks: More teams are paying for AI every month.
The AI subscription stack is getting crowded.
Recurring AI costs are now operational costs.
